full_text:
Zhang Chun 張純
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Chun (張純)was born in Yuyang. Passed over for promotion, he led the Wuhuan in revolt. After initial success, Liu Yu turned up and Chun was betrayed. Zhang Chun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhang Chun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
